channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Tanker Fleet
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Position: Chief Engineer
Vessel: LPG TANKER
DWT / Built: 56,500 / 2024

Requirements:
• Previous experience in the same rank on the LPG with ME-C experience in the last 4-5 years of sea service
• Good English

Terms:
• Salary: Negotiable
• Rotation: 4M ON / 4M OFF
• Joining: ASAP

If interested and available, please send your CV to the contacts provided.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Engineer Position on LPG Tanker – ME-C Experience Required at Maritime Universal

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Position: CAPTAIN, 4th Engineer

Vessel: Oil & Chemical Tanker

Deadweight / Built: 50,479 / 2025

Captain Requirements:

  • Previous experience in the same rank on a similar deadweight
  • Good English skills

4th Engineer Requirements:

  • Previous experience on a tanker with ME-C Engine
  • Good English skills

Terms:

  • Salary: Negotiable
  • Rotation: 4 months ON / 4 months OFF
  • Joining: ASAP

If interested and available, please send your CV to the provided contacts.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Captain and 4th Engineer on Oil & Chemical Tanker – STCW Required at Maritime Universal

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Joining: week 25 or week 31
Duration: 4 weeks on-off rotation

Experience as OS/AB on board tanker fleet;
Candidates must hold valid STCW certificates including Medical cert.,
Basic Gas Certificate, II/4 COP;
Good English level is a must;
EU Passport.

Type: CO2 Tanker DP2
Year built: 2026
Flag: Netherlands
GT: 8827; DWT: 14330
ME: Wärtsilä 6L32, 2999 kW



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] OS/AB Position on DP2 CO2 Carrier Tanker – STCW Required at OJ Crew
[Gold Job] Urgent need for our Tanker fleet at

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Joining: week 21 (mid-end May)
Duration: 6-8 weeks

Experience as AB on board tanker fleet;
Candidates must hold valid STCW certificates including Medical cert.;
Basic Gas Certificate
Good English level is a must;
EU Passport.

Type: CO2 Tanker DP2
Year built: 2026
Flag: Netherlands
GT: 8827; DWT: 14330
ME: Wärtsilä 6L32, 2999 kW



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] AB Position on DP2 CO2 Carrier Tanker – STCW Required at OJ Crew

item.description:
Location:
Description:

LNG Masters with immediate availability to join a client’s growing XDF fleet.

Requirements:

  • Minimum 12 months’ experience in rank on LNG tankers
  • Valid US Visa
  • Ready to join at short notice


Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] LNG Masters for XDF Fleet – Immediate Availability Required at Northern Marine Management Limited
[Gold Job] Open vacancy for Ch. Engineer on Ch./Oil tanker at
[Gold Job] OPEN VACANCY FOR MASTER ON CH./OIL TANKER at

item.description:
Location:
Description:

3rd Officer from Europe to join a Tanker from our client on long term basis. The client operates several Tankers and opportunites to grow are there. The contract duration is 4 months and the wages are 4300 USD presently.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 3rd Officer Position on Tanker Vessel – Long Term Contract at Lighthaus-Marine GmbH

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Position available for an Electrical Officer of the Watch (EOOW) to join an Oil Tanker. The duration of the contract is approximately 3 weeks. The role requires a UK EOOW (III/1) Certificate of Competency (COC) with a Tanker Endorsement. Candidates must have the right to work in the UK.

If interested and available, please send your CV.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Electrical Officer of the Watch (EOOW) on Oil Tanker – Tanker Endorsement Required at Seaworthy Consulting LTD
